signals.snippet: Hey there, the system is great but its actually causing more stress because I cant keep up with the communication. The reason I even signed up was for the AI voice agent so if we cannot get that started soon then I would like to put my 30 d

cause_analysis.narrative: The Real Deep Tissue churned on 2026-02-25 after 140 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2025-12-17 via app_chat — 70 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 70 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
